## cogeni run

Execute a Lua script

### Synopsis

Run a Lua script file, execute inline code with -e, or read from stdin.

```
cogeni run [script.lua] [flags]
```

### Options

```
  -e, --eval string   Execute inline Lua code
  -h, --help          help for run
```
